---
title: "Data Export"
subtitle: A dataset file exported from the pilot database
---

The data file was created for the initial analysis using the Vannmiljø data.

## Data Availability

A tab-delimited file containing all major data from the database is available for download at the following location.

 * [pilot_vannmiljo.tsv.gz](https://github.com/seafood-hazards/vannmiljo-pilot/releases/download/v0.1.1/pilot_vannmiljo.tsv.gz)

## Data File Summary

The file `pilot_vannmiljo.tsv.gz` is a denormalized (flat) export of the relational database, designed to facilitate immediate analysis without requiring complex SQL joins.

## Column Definition

```{r}
library(tibble)

# Definition of the exported TSV columns and their sources
exported_columns_tbl <- tibble(
  `Column Name` = c(
    # Activity Metadata
    "activity_id", "activity_name",

    # Site Metadata
    "site_code", "site_name", "lon", "lat", "dist_to_coast",
    "country", "country_code", "municipality", "sea_name",

    # Sample Metadata
    "sample_time", "upper_depth", "lower_depth", "sample_no", "n_values",

    # Parameter Metadata
    "param_id", "param_name",

    # Methods
    "method", "analysis",

    # Chemistry / Measurement Data
    "value", "unit", "operator",

    # Limits of Detection/Quantification
    "lod", "loq"
  ),

  `Source Table` = c(
    "Activity", "Activity",
    "Site", "Site", "Site", "Site", "Site",
    "Site", "Site", "Site", "Site",
    "Sample", "Sample", "Sample", "Sediment", "Sediment",
    "Parameter", "Parameter",
    "Sample Method", "Analysis Method",
    "Sediment", "Analysis Method", "Sediment",
    "LLD (Filtered)", "LLD (Filtered)"
  ),

  `Description` = c(
    "Unique identifier for the activity/monitoring program",
    "Name of the activity or monitoring program",
    "Unique code for the sampling site",
    "Name of the sampling location",
    "Longitude coordinate (decimal degrees)",
    "Latitude coordinate (decimal degrees)",
    "Distance to the nearest coastline",
    "Country name",
    "Country code",
    "Municipality name",
    "Name of the sea or coastal water body",
    "Date and time when the sample was collected",
    "Upper depth of the sampled interval",
    "Lower depth of the sampled interval",
    "Physical sample identification number",
    "Number of values or replicates used to derive the measurement",
    "Unique identifier for the chemical parameter",
    "Name of the chemical parameter measured",
    "Method or equipment used to take the sample",
    "Laboratory analysis method used",
    "Measured concentration or numerical result",
    "Unit of measurement for the value",
    "Mathematical operator (e.g., <, =) indicating if value is below detection limits",
    "Limit of Detection (LOD) value",
    "Limit of Quantification (LOQ) value"
  )
)

exported_columns_tbl
```
